batch_objective: Fold the prototype-approved view-enhancement treatments into the real s19tui TUI across 4 views (prototype: prototypes/view-enhancements.prototype.html, NOTES.md; operator-approved 2026-07-07). A2L Explorer -> master/detail (scannable tag list + readable record card, replacing the 16-column crush). Issues Report -> worst-first worklist of cards (plain-language message + Open-in actions). Workspace -> inline signal (per-range coverage micro-bars + whole-image memory strip + stat right pane). MAC View -> leading per-row status glyphs. TUI-side only; NO engine-frozen module touched. C-16 (real-mechanism ATs) + C-17 (markup-safe render of file-derived text + hostile-input ATs) apply directly (both A2L card + Issues worklist render loaded-file symbol/message text).

[AUTONOMOUS] CORRECTS the prior entry's item (3): the 5x tc_065 failures were NOT the pre-existing flake -- they were MY batch's regression. DILIGENCE: git-stashed batch -> tc_065 class on clean main aa126fe = 7 passed/1 xfailed in 34s; my branch = 4-5 failed in 252-276s (7x slower). ROOT CAUSE (repro: textual.pilot.WaitForScreenTimeout, pure perf-cascade not a leak): Inc-2 GroupedIssuesPanel.render_groups mounted 1 IssueRow (Horizontal+2 Static=3 widgets) per issue for the FULL page_size(200) window = ~600 non-virtualized widgets/render (old DataTable was virtualized) -> floods message pump so pilot.pause never settles; also a REAL app-perf bug (200 issues -> ~35s Issues render). FIX (software-dev, 1 product file issues_view.py): _GROUP_DISPLAY_MAX=40 cap on mounted rows (group headers still report whole-filtered counts; truncation note when capped). Tightens DoS bound (mounted<=40<=200). tc_065 class NOW 7 passed/1 xfailed in 34s (==main); directionb -k 039/042_ 16 passed; issues_view 3 passed; engine guard 0 diffs; ruff clean. 0 US-039 ATs weakened (all seed <=4 issues; AT-039f/TC-042.6 are <= bounds). PENDING: AT-039g direct mass-mount regression test (seed ~200, assert query(IssueRow)<=_GROUP_DISPLAY_MAX + render settles) being added; then FULL-SUITE RE-RUN to confirm batch fully green before Phase-3 gate.
